# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: DSA Practice Gets a Cyberpunk Twist: Real-Time AI Assist Meets Tower-Defense Vibes
- Summary: Showcase CodeGrind's latest DSA practice evolution with AI-assisted guidance and a cyberpunk Code Breach aesthetic, highlighting real-time feedback and interactive problem solving.
- Slug: codegrind-dsa-practice-evolution
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-dsa-practice-evolution
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-07-11-codegrind-dsa-practice-evolution.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind blends LeetCode-style problems with Azure OpenAI-assisted guidance and a cyberpunk visual theme, delivering an immersive, feedback-rich DSA practice experience.
- CTA: Try a problem now and engage with AI help to optimize solutions in real time.
- Visual brief: A short motion clip: split-screen showing (left) live code editor with green success ticks and (right) dynamic cyberpunk game-like visuals representing problem concepts as towers; include subtle UI glow, code-to-solution flowlines, and a quick problem prompt at the bottom.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
